title: autobench.result v1
description: Verdict-level signals from autobench evaluator. Emitted after each benchmark case execution. Source: /autobench/evaluator.

id.description: ULID — unique identifier for this event

source.description: Source URI — always /autobench/evaluator for this channel

datacontenttype.description: Content type of the data field

time.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the result was recorded

problem_id.description: Unique identifier for the benchmark case (e.g., case id from BenchmarkCase)

verdict.description: Execution verdict: CE=Compilation Error, RE=Runtime Error, TLE=Time Limit Exceeded, MLE=Memory Limit Exceeded, WA=Wrong Answer, OK=Correct

p_time.description: Normalized time [0.0, 1.0] — 1.0 means fastest within budget

harness_version.description: Version identifier for the harness configuration used

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark suite this case belongs to

iteration.description: RSI iteration number if running self-improvement loop, else 0

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency in milliseconds for this case

tokens_used.description: Number of tokens consumed during generation

cost_dollars.description: Actual cost in dollars for this case

error.description: Error message or traceback if verdict is CE, RE, or WA

metadata.description: Arbitrary extra data from the harness result
